name: Yucatan Marinade (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the olive oil in a food processor.
2. Process for 30 seconds with the lid on.
3. With the motor running, slowly add the olive oil through the feed tube.
4. Continue processing until the mixture is smooth and emulsified.
5. Store in an airtight container for up to one week.
